name: Toast and Egg Scramble
instructions:
1. Cut the white bread into 1-inch cubes. Dice the tomato into small pieces. Grate the cheddar cheese.

2. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted.

3. Add the bread cubes to the skillet. Toast for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden and crispy on all sides.

4. Push the toasted bread to one side of the skillet. Crack the eggs into the empty side.

5. Season eggs with salt. Scramble the eggs gently for 2-3 minutes until just set but still slightly moist.

6. Add the diced tomato to the skillet. Toss everything together - bread, eggs, and tomato.

7. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese over the top. Let it sit for 30 seconds until cheese starts to melt.

8. Serve immediately straight from the skillet.
simpleInstructions:
1. Cut bread into cubes, dice tomato, grate cheese.

2. Melt butter in skillet. Add bread cubes and toast 3-4 minutes until golden.

3. Push bread aside, crack eggs into skillet. Season and scramble 2-3 minutes.

4. Add tomato, toss everything together. Sprinkle cheese on top, let melt 30 seconds.

5. Serve immediately.
